query:
SELECT 
  bve.id,
  bve.report_id,
  bve.unit_id,
  u.name AS unit_name,
  bve.doctor_user_id,
  usr.name AS doctor_name,
  bve.financial_responsible_id,
  fr.name AS responsible_name,
  bve.system_amount_due,
  bve.doctor_amount_due,
  bve.pricing_status,
  bve.signed_at,
  bve.created_at
FROM billing_visit_events bve
LEFT JOIN units u ON u.id = bve.unit_id
LEFT JOIN users usr ON usr.id = bve.doctor_user_id
LEFT JOIN financial_responsibles fr ON fr.id = bve.financial_responsible_id
ORDER BY bve.created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
